tailored.title: What’s next in Google AI infrastructure: Scaling for the agentic era
tailored.summary: Google Cloud is scaling its AI infrastructure for the agentic era, which is crucial for Verizon's MLOps and Agentic AI initiatives. This upgrade will enable more efficient deployment of local LLMs.

tailored.title: What’s new in GKE at Next ‘26
tailored.summary: Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) is evolving to deliver leading capabilities, which can be useful for Verizon's multi-agent systems and local GPUs, especially when integrated with GCP.

tailored.title: HKUDS/RAG-Anything
tailored.summary: RAG-Anything is an all-in-one RAG framework that can be useful for Verizon's MLOps and Agentic AI initiatives, especially in developing local LLMs.

telecom.title: Zayo’s long-haul business is going gangbusters because of AI
telecom.summary: Zayo's long-haul business is thriving due to AI, which is relevant to Verizon's telecom interests. However, there is no direct mention of Verizon, AT&T, or Agentic Networks in this article.

top_stories.title: Google updates Workspace to make AI your new office intern
top_stories.summary: Google's update to Workspace integrates AI, making it a potential tool for Verizon's MLOps and Agentic AI initiatives, especially in automating tasks and enhancing productivity.

cautionary.title: OWASP GenAI Exploit Round-up Report Q1 2026
cautionary.summary: The OWASP GenAI Exploit Round-up Report highlights potential security risks associated with AI, which is crucial for Verizon to consider when deploying MLOps and Agentic AI solutions.
